default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Finder and GrowthX to explore AI content automation options and compare GrowthX's offering to Aerox.](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Finder is considering GrowthX and Aerox as top contenders for AI content automation, with speed to market being a key factor](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [GrowthX differentiates through a comprehensive sprint process, custom platform, and high-touch strategic approach vs. Aerox's more self-service model](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [GrowthX pricing (\~$0.20/word for editorial, \~$100 for programmatic pages) is positioned as cost-effective vs. traditional freelancers ($1+/word)](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Finder weighing build vs. buy decision; GrowthX emphasizing their specialized expertise and ability to move faster than in-house development](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [Recently transitioned off Aerox to custom-built platform](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Platform enables modular workflows, fact-checking, style adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Includes features like in-line content editing and image generation](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Aims to give customers more transparency/access in the future](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

### GrowthX Sprint Process

  - [2-week calibration phase to deeply understand client's audience, voice, content needs](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [Deliverables include persona development, writing guidelines, content examples](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
  - [Sets roadmap with 2 high-conviction content lanes + 1 experimental lane](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)
  - [Involves senior team members (VP Growth, Managing Editor, SEO Director)](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)

### Pricing and Positioning

  - [Editorial content: \~$0.20/word](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2716.0)
  - [Programmatic pages: \~$100/page](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2738.0)
  - [Positioned as more cost-effective than traditional freelancers ($1+/word)](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2750.0)
  - [Additional value through strategic guidance and specialized team](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2925.0)

### Finder's Decision Factors

  - [Speed to market is critical due to closing organic traffic window](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Weighing GrowthX's agency model vs. Aerox's platform approach](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)
  - [Considering internal build option; need to justify external solution](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
  - [Some internal hesitation around full AI adoption](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=3242.0)

### Potential Content Opportunities

  - [Local content (e.g., mortgage rates by city/state)](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Milestone-based content (e.g., first home, new baby)](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2436.0)
  - [Persona-specific content (e.g., students)](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send meeting recording and additional materials (Loom videos, case studies)](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=3019.0)
  - [Jeremy to use GrowthX materials for internal education/buy-in](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=3515.0)
  - [Jeremy to continue building business case, comparing GrowthX, Aerox, and internal options](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=3502.0)
  - [Potential exploration of custom opportunities beyond content creation (e.g., research workflows)](https://fathom.video/share/gn-Du2GeJy2FybvpVV_amBFExf-_mMjE?tab=summary&timestamp=3308.0)
